content: Remote OK Scrum Master Haystack We're hiring on behalf of a Haystack partner!<br><br>The Role<br><br><ul><li> Coach a development team on Agile best practices, focusing on sprint goals to ensure project success.</li><li> Apply Scrum principles to resolve routine problems and strengthen sustainable process improvements.</li><li> Facilitate Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, sprint reviews, and sprint retrospectives.</li><li> Collect and write detailed user stories, identify associated tasks and acceptance criteria.</li><li> Analyze and improve business processes in collaboration with the project team.</li><li> Maintain a product backlog and support QA and requirement validation.<br><br></li></ul>What You'll Need<br><br><ul><li> 2+ years of experience as a Scrum Master for an engineering team.</li><li> Proven experience with Jira, including managing and integrating Jira boards for multiple teams.</li><li> Experience leading client delivery engagements and interacting with senior-level client management.</li><li> Ability to teach basic Agile framework concepts to technical teams.</li><li> A Secret security clearance.</li><li> A Bachelor's degree.<br><br></li></ul>What's On Offer<br><br><ul><li> Opportunity to impact defense and national security industries.</li><li> A collaborative team environment that values your contributions.</li><li> Comprehensive benefits package, professional development, and tuition assistance.</li><li> Support for work-life balance and employee well-being.<br><br></li></ul>Apply via Haystack today!<br><br> design, video, exec Washington, Washington, District of Columbia, United States 2026-06-20T13:56:09+00:00 1133814 PARISA WANG is looking for a remote Social Media Manager to lead social media planning, execution芒聙娄See this and similar jobs on LinkedIn. exec, social media United Kingdom, 2026-06-20T08:03:53+00:00 1133734 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-social-media-manager-luxury-fashion-tiktok-instagram-parisa-wang-1133734 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Certified CMMC Assessor OCT Consulting, LLC <p></p><p>Certified CMMC Assessor (CCA)脗 脗 </p><p>OCT Consulting is a business management and technology consulting firm that supports Federal Government clients. We provide consulting services in the areas of Strategy, Process Improvement, Change Management, Program and Project Management, Acquisition/Procurement, and Information Technology.</p><p>Responsibilities and Duties</p><p>OCT currently has an opening for a Certified CMMC Assessor (CCA) to support the build-out of OCT芒聙聶s CMMC Certified Third-Party Assessment Organization (C3PAO) practice. This position conducts CMMC Level 2 certification assessment activities as a member of the assessment team under the direction of the Lead Certified CMMC Assessor.</p><p>Day to day responsibilities include:</p><ul><li>Conduct CMMC Level 2 certification assessment activities as a member of the assessment team under the direction of the Lead Assessor (LCCA).</li><li>Examine documentation and artifacts, interview personnel, and test security controls across the 110 NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 requirements using NIST SP 800-171A methods.</li><li>Document findings and recommend MET / NOT MET / NOT APPLICABLE determinations for assigned requirements, with supporting evidence.</li><li>Support development of the assessment plan, scope validation, and pre-assessment readiness reviews.</li><li>Contribute to the assessment report and support POA&amp;M closeout activities within the required timeframe.</li><li>Maintain assessment evidence and working papers in accordance with C3PAO procedures and ISO/IEC 17020:2012.</li><li>Adhere to the Cyber AB Code of Professional Conduct, conflict-of-interest, ethics, and impartiality requirements at all times.</li></ul><p></p><ul><li>Must be a U.S. Citizen. U.S. citizenship is mandatory for this role because all personnel participating in the CMMC Level 2 certification assessment process must complete a Tier 3 background investigation resulting in a determination of national security eligibility.</li><li>Active Certified CMMC Assessor (CCA) certification in good standing.</li><li>Must be able to obtain and maintain a favorable Tier 3 background investigation resulting in a national security eligibility determination (this is not a security clearance and is not for the purpose of government employment). The investigation will involve a credit, fingerprint, and law enforcement agency check.</li><li>Bachelor芒聙聶s degree in cybersecurity, information technology, information systems, or a related field, or equivalent professional experience.</li><li>Typically 4+ years of cybersecurity or information assurance experience, including exposure to NIST SP 800-171 / CMMC.</li><li>Working knowledge of NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2, NIST SP 800-171A, 32 CFR Part 170, and DFARS 252.204-7012.</li><li>Additional certifications such as CompTIA Security+, CISSP, CISA, or CCP preferred.</li><li>Strong documentation, analytical, and communication skills.</li><li>Location / on-site: Remote-eligible with availability to travel to client sites for on-site assessment activities as required.</li></ul><p></p><p>Salary Range: $35- $50 hourly commensurate with experience, education, etc. This role may be available as either a part-time or full-time opportunity.</p><p>About OCT Consulting</p><p>OCT Consulting LLC is a Small脗 Business (SB) providing professional services and information technology solutions to the Fed
